---
title: "Overlay Generation"
author: "Nosepass"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(magick)

script_dir <- dirname(normalizePath(knitr::current_input(), mustWork = FALSE))
source(file.path(script_dir, "path_helpers.R"))

get_year_dirs <- function(root_dir) {
  dirs <- list.dirs(root_dir, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
  year_dirs <- dirs[grepl("^[0-9]{4}$", basename(dirs))]
  if (length(year_dirs) > 0) {
    return(year_dirs)
  }
  dirs
}

custom_output_dir <- Sys.getenv("NOSEPASS_OUTPUT_DIR", unset = "")
if (!nzchar(custom_output_dir)) custom_output_dir <- NULL

paths <- get_paths(custom_output_dir)
root_dir <- paths$server_dir
fullsize_dir <- file.path(paths$magnetograms_dir, "fullsize")
overlay_base_dir <- file.path(paths$magnetograms_dir, "rds_overlays")
rds_target_base_dir <- file.path(paths$magnetograms_dir, "rds")
csv_base_dir <- file.path(paths$magnetograms_dir, "csv")

if (!dir.exists(root_dir)) {
  stop("Server directory not found: ", root_dir)
}

year_dirs <- get_year_dirs(root_dir)
```

## Example single overlay

```{r, fig.height = 8}
if (length(year_dirs) == 0) {
  stop("No year directories found in: ", root_dir)
}

example_year <- basename(year_dirs[1])
example_rds_files <- list.files(
  year_dirs[1],
  pattern = "\\.RDS$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
example_rds_files <- example_rds_files[!grepl("FailToProcess", example_rds_files, ignore.case = TRUE)]

if (length(example_rds_files) == 0) {
  stop("No example RDS files found in: ", year_dirs[1])
}

example_rds <- example_rds_files[1]
rds_name <- basename(example_rds)
png_name <- sub("\\.tif-Digitized\\.RDS$", ".tif.png", rds_name, ignore.case = TRUE)
image_path <- file.path(fullsize_dir, example_year, png_name)

if (!file.exists(image_path)) {
  stop("Example image not found: ", image_path)
}

img <- image_read(image_path)
newRDS <- readRDS(example_rds)

img_info <- image_info(img)
img_width <- img_info$width
img_height <- img_info$height

example_output_dir <- file.path(paths$output_dir, "examples")
dir.create(example_output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
example_output <- file.path(example_output_dir, sub("\\.RDS$", "-lines.png", rds_name, ignore.case = TRUE))

png(example_output, width = img_width, height = img_height, bg = "transparent")
par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, img_width), ylim = c(0, img_height), xlab = "", ylab = "", axes = FALSE)

if (!is.null(newRDS$TopTraceMatrix) && !is.null(newRDS$TopTraceStartEnds)) {
  x_top <- seq_len(length(newRDS$TopTraceMatrix)) + newRDS$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125 - 1
  lines(x_top, y = newRDS$TopTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red", lwd = 10)
}

if (!is.null(newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix) && !is.null(newRDS$BottomTraceStartEnds)) {
  x_bot <- seq_len(length(newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix)) + newRDS$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125 - 1
  lines(x_bot, y = newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix + 96, col = "green", lwd = 10)
}

dev.off()
message("Example overlay created: ", example_output)
```

## Create all RDS overlays

```{r}
for (year_dir in year_dirs) {
  year <- basename(year_dir)
  rds_files <- list.files(year_dir, pattern = "\\.RDS$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  rds_files <- rds_files[!grepl("FailToProcess", rds_files, ignore.case = TRUE)]

  for (rds_path in rds_files) {
    newRDS <- readRDS(rds_path)

    rds_basename <- basename(rds_path)
    png_name <- sub("\\.tif-Digitized\\.RDS$", ".tif.png", rds_basename, ignore.case = TRUE)
    image_path <- file.path(fullsize_dir, year, png_name)

    if (!file.exists(image_path)) {
      warning("Image not found for: ", rds_path)
      next
    }

    img <- image_read(image_path)
    img_info <- image_info(img)
    img_width <- img_info$width
    img_height <- img_info$height

    output_name <- sub("\\.RDS$", "-lines.png", rds_basename, ignore.case = TRUE)
    output_dir <- file.path(overlay_base_dir, year)
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    output_path <- file.path(output_dir, output_name)

    png(output_path, width = img_width, height = img_height, bg = "transparent")
    par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i")
    plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, img_width), ylim = c(0, img_height), xlab = "", ylab = "", axes = FALSE)

    if (!is.null(newRDS$TopTraceMatrix) && !is.null(newRDS$TopTraceStartEnds)) {
      x_top <- seq_len(length(newRDS$TopTraceMatrix)) + newRDS$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125 - 1
      lines(x_top, y = newRDS$TopTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red", lwd = 10)
    }

    if (!is.null(newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix) && !is.null(newRDS$BottomTraceStartEnds)) {
      x_bot <- seq_len(length(newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix)) + newRDS$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125 - 1
      lines(x_bot, y = newRDS$BottomTraceMatrix + 96, col = "green", lwd = 10)
    }

    dev.off()
    message("Overlay created: ", output_path)
  }
}
```

## Copy all RDS files for website

```{r}
dir.create(rds_target_base_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (year_dir in year_dirs) {
  year <- basename(year_dir)
  rds_files <- list.files(year_dir, pattern = "\\.RDS$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  rds_files <- rds_files[!grepl("FailToProcess", rds_files, ignore.case = TRUE)]

  for (rds_path in rds_files) {
    target_year_dir <- file.path(rds_target_base_dir, year)
    dir.create(target_year_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    target_path <- file.path(target_year_dir, basename(rds_path))
    file.copy(rds_path, target_path, overwrite = TRUE)
    message("Copied RDS file: ", target_path)
  }
}

message("All RDS files copied successfully")
```

## Create CSV files from traces

```{r}
dir.create(csv_base_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (year_dir in year_dirs) {
  year <- basename(year_dir)
  rds_files <- list.files(year_dir, pattern = "\\.RDS$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  rds_files <- rds_files[!grepl("FailToProcess", rds_files, ignore.case = TRUE)]

  for (rds_path in rds_files) {
    rds <- tryCatch(readRDS(rds_path), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(rds)) {
      next
    }

    if (!is.null(rds$TopTraceMatrix) && !is.null(rds$TopTraceStartEnds)) {
      x_top <- seq(
        from = rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125,
        to = rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End + 125,
        length.out = length(rds$TopTraceMatrix)
      )
      y_top <- rds$TopTraceMatrix + 96
    } else {
      x_top <- y_top <- NULL
    }

    if (!is.null(rds$BottomTraceMatrix) && !is.null(rds$BottomTraceStartEnds)) {
      x_bot <- seq(
        from = rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125,
        to = rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End + 125,
        length.out = length(rds$BottomTraceMatrix)
      )
      y_bot <- rds$BottomTraceMatrix + 96
    } else {
      x_bot <- y_bot <- NULL
    }

    n_max <- max(length(x_top), length(x_bot), 0)
    out_df <- data.frame(
      TopX = c(x_top, rep(NA, n_max - length(x_top))),
      TopY = c(y_top, rep(NA, n_max - length(y_top))),
      BottomX = c(x_bot, rep(NA, n_max - length(x_bot))),
      BottomY = c(y_bot, rep(NA, n_max - length(y_bot)))
    )

    if (nrow(out_df) > 0) {
      csv_year_dir <- file.path(csv_base_dir, year)
      dir.create(csv_year_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

      csv_name <- paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(rds_path)), ".csv")
      csv_path <- file.path(csv_year_dir, csv_name)
      write.csv(out_df, csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
      message("Created CSV: ", csv_path)
    }
  }
}

message("All CSV files processed successfully")
```
